intro.heading: The Collection
intro.body: Six essentials formulated for wavy, curly, and coily hair (types 3B–4B).

feature.heading: Powered by Our Patented Complex
feature.body: Our patented complex delivers conditioning benefits that nourish, fortify, and protect — while promoting extraordinary, healthy hair growth and helping hair hold styles and resist frizz.

ingredients.heading: Key Ingredients
ingredients.intro: Restorative ingredients sourced from around the world, from suppliers who share our values of sustainability and ethical practices.
